title: Marc Cain Blazer — Red
image_captions: Red blazer with black buttons and a visible neck tag reading MARC BY MARCO.
Red blazer with black buttons and a visible neck tag reading MARC BY MARCO.
Detail shot showing a dark brown button with 'MARC CAIN' embossed on the front of a red garment.
Neck tag reading MARCCAIN. No tape measure, care label, or flaw visible.
Horizontal tape measure showing 41cm at the garment edge.
Vertical tape measure showing 59cm at the fabric's edge.
Back view showing red long-sleeved garment with visible center seam and raglan sleeve construction.
